overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a rain-soaked futuristic city street lined with neon-lit storefronts and towering holographic billboards. The camera follows the character as they navigate past pedestrians, food vendors, and steam vents while approaching a massive cylindrical mega-structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial sidewalk with neon storefronts and crosswalk

events.description: character begins walking forward from the crosswalk signal
pedestrian with purple umbrella passes in front of the camera

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the rain-soaked sidewalk past neon-lit storefronts, glancing at the BITTERHEART club entrance

notable_agents.action: pedestrian carrying a purple umbrella walking past the camera

entered.detail: large red pedestrian signal box with yellow walking figure illuminated
red and yellow painted fire hydrant on the sidewalk corner
building facade with prominent green neon trim and BITTERHEART signage
tall digital billboard kiosk displaying animated food advertisements
raised highway structure with flying vehicles visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at a city crosswalk with a red pedestrian signal box and fire hydrant visible. The character walks along a wet concrete sidewalk lined with palm trees, passing the green neon-lit BITTERHEART club on the right. An elevated highway with flying traffic runs parallel on the left, while digital advertising kiosks dot the sidewalk. A pedestrian with a purple umbrella passes by in the foreground.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with food vendor and approaching mega tower

events.description: camera tilts upward revealing the massive cylindrical mega tower with wraparound billboards
passing blue food cart and entering area with visible steam vent

agents.ego_description: continuing down the sidewalk, glancing at the food vendor and looking up at the towering structure ahead

notable_agents.action: food vendor standing at the blue cart

entered.detail: small blue food cart with vendor and illuminated menu display
bright pink neon sign reading LOVE INC on building facade
massive cylindrical skyscraper covered in wraparound digital billboards and advertisements
street vent emitting thick white steam into the air

segments.scene_description: The character moves past the initial storefronts into a section featuring a blue food cart and a prominent pink LOVE INC neon sign. The camera pans up to reveal a massive cylindrical mega tower covered in digital billboards dominating the skyline ahead. Steam rises from a street vent as the character continues forward, with the elevated highway receding into the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: plaza area at the base of the mega tower with barricades

events.description: camera tilts sharply upward to view the top of the mega tower
moving from street into more open plaza space with concrete barricades

agents.ego_description: walking while looking up at the massive cylindrical tower, then continuing through the plaza area

entered.detail: white and red concrete barriers blocking off part of the plaza
tall dark glass building with grid-like window pattern
small covered shelter structure on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the base of the mega tower, with the camera tilting up to show its immense height and wraparound advertisements. Steam continues to rise from street vents as the environment opens into a plaza area marked by concrete barricades. A dark glass skyscraper looms on the right, and the character passes a transit shelter while the green neon building recedes behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with color-changing neon storefront

events.description: entering area with prominent purple neon lighting on building facade
neon lights on building shift from purple to blue color

agents.ego_description: walking through the open plaza past pedestrians near the neon-lit building entrance

notable_agents.action: pedestrian standing near the neon-lit storefront entrance

entered.detail: building entrance with large color-changing neon lights shifting between purple and blue
massive digital screen displaying animated advertisements on building facade

segments.scene_description: The character enters a more open plaza dominated by a building with vibrant color-changing neon lights that shift from purple to blue. The mega tower is now behind, while concrete barricades line the left side of the path. Pedestrians gather near the neon-lit entrance, and large digital billboards are visible on the surrounding buildings as the character continues through the futuristic urban space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-soaked futuristic street that gradually opens into a vast, neon-lit urban plaza. It begins at a city crosswalk beside a red signal box, moving along a wet sidewalk past palm trees and the green neon glow of the Bitterheart club while flying traffic hums on a parallel elevated highway. As the character advances, the scene shifts past a blue food cart and a pink Love Inc sign, with the camera panning upward to reveal a massive cylindrical mega tower dominating the skyline. The perspective then tilts further up to emphasize the tower's immense height and wraparound advertisements as the character passes through rising steam and concrete barricades toward a dark glass skyscraper. Finally, the environment expands into an open plaza where the mega tower recedes and the lighting transforms into vibrant, color-changing purple and blue hues emanating from a large building entrance.
